title: Simply Pots
description: A mod that adds Pots randomly in your world with useful loot.
body:
This mod adds multiple pots that spawn in different biomes and dimensions randomly.

For now, it adds 14 pots.

In the pots you will find useful loot corresponding with the game phase you are able to access them.

Be careful when you break them, some mobs like to live inside of them !

**Surface Pots :**

Pots that drop early game loot like food, crops, stone tools and more rarely ores

![Surface Pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fde977aecc538e2d46b6751cd3ad7eb0d69100bc.png)

__**Desert Pots :**__

Pretty much the same thing as the _Surface Pot_ but with a little more desert themed loot

![Desert Pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29b6c5677d5ed778993017571bae01bb2fff5809.png)

__**Snowy Pots :**__

__**Only available in 3.7.0 mod version or above.**__

Cold biome themed _Surface Pot_ with cold loot such as snow, snowballs and berries

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_9a363d38-7dea-4fd4-90ec-1a96d8d2f177.png)

__**Jungle Pots :**__

__**Only available in 3.5.0 mod version or above.**__

Jungle themed _Surface Pot_ with a jungle themed loot such as melon slices or cacao beans

![Jungle pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b381349a0201249fad79a2e0b463986e4591f2f.png)

__**Icy Pots :**__

__**Only available in 3.10.0 mod version or above.**__

A pot with a polar bear face encased in ice. Inside you can find all the ice blocks and loot resembling the snowy pots loot with more fish

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_581072d9-1d59-4180-bfed-39858e78a2f3.png)

 

__**Swamp Pots :**__

A packed mud pot with mushrooms on top (a new functionality will be added in a later update)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_39c0271a-7f34-4400-adee-07fbf50853ea.png)

**Cave Pots :**

These pots drop Mid game loot like iron tools, ores and potions. But also cave friendly loot like torches and food to help you explore longer.

![Cave Pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a20fcedf5f14dd3c2d9f2ca2afdc580d36b31228_0.webp)

__**Lush Pots :**__

__**Only available in 3.6.0 mod version or above.**__

Cave Pots overgrown by moss and small sporeblossoms that drop the same thing as the cave pots but with added lush caves blocks such as clay, spore blossoms and dripleafs.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_356abf28-145f-4f37-a536-b81b1ad625a1.png)

**__Ocean Pots :__**

**__Only available in 3.4.0 mod version or above.__**

A very useful pot for ocean exploration that refills all the oxygen of the player breaking it. The loot inside is a little worse than the _Cave Loot_ pot. Inside you could find things like _prismarine, fishing rods, scutes_ and _Water Breathing_ potions.

![Ocean Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2219a030c8308be0c863f35456af8da68255bc4f.png)

**Nether Pots :**

Nether pots give more loot and ores but also stronger potions and all the iron tools with random enchantments and low durability and usefull things for Nether exploration such as gold, fire resistance potions and warped fungus on a stick.

![Nether Pots Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ca41c7c0806680fc25ee5cb5d6f4440a5f48fde_0.webp)

__**Warped Pots :**__

Nether pots covered in warped nylium that generate in the warped forest. They have the same loot but with warped forest biome items.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_11954b4e-7898-44ca-aa0d-e34e74d4f77d.png)

 

__**Crimson Pots :**__

__**Only available in 3.9.0 mod version or above.**__

Nether pots covered in crimson nylium that generate in the crimson forest. They have the same loot as the nether pots but with crimson forest biome items.

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1142970/description_d1aefe8b-f546-4e65-b616-ddb9561a7cad.png)**


**End Pots :**

The best pots where you can find ore blocks, more diamonds, rockets to fly with the elytra, dragon breath in a bottle, enchanted golden apples, ender pearls and other end game stuff.

![End Pot Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5237c37583c86b3cfe19086bf582913813a2f6da_0.webp)

**Sculk Pots :**

A rare pot found only on sculk blocks in Deep Dark biomes. When you break this pot, you will find useful loot to avoid or distract the warden like snowballs, eggs and wool but also a lot of ores, potions and sometimes tools.

![Sculk Pot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b9265d109ad8b1221d2db6d8a5b616ba6e3211_0.webp)

**More biome specific pots will be added.**

Planned pots :

Floating Pots

Drip Pots

River Pots

Pale Pots 

Sakura Pots

Soul Pots

Basalt Pots

Amethyst Pots

(Mountain Pots ?)
